content.body: https://forge.etsi.org/rep/cyber/stan4cr2/en-304-617/-/merge_requests/59 amends the requirements for powerful features, and adds assessments.

Of note is a tightening of the definition of Powerful Web Platform Features to try and keep things high level and prevent an explosion of exceptions and caveats. I also removed some of the requirements that were redundant or otherwise.

* Of note is a tightening of the definition of Powerful Web Platform Features to try and keep things high level and prevent an explosion of exceptions and caveats. I also removed some of the requirements that were redundant or otherwise

See the MR comments for more details.
